creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello Jan,

since the update to 23.2.0.b.2280, wine gets virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow.

When i start an eh.. lets say "Resource hungry game with many shaders etc.." then the game hangs and in the logs i do see:

0ba8:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 4160 bytes in thread 0ba8 addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x3850ffc0 (0x38510000-0x38512000-0x38610000)
0b9c:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 4160 bytes in thread 0b9c addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x345fffc0 (0x34600000-0x34602000-0x34700000)
0ba4:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 4160 bytes in thread 0ba4 addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x383effc0 (0x383f0000-0x383f2000-0x384f0000)
0ba0:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 4160 bytes in thread 0ba0 addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x365effc0 (0x365f0000-0x365f2000-0x366f0000)
0b98:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 4160 bytes in thread 0b98 addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x33f1ffc0 (0x33f20000-0x33f22000-0x34020000)
0bac:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 1456 bytes in thread 0bac addr 0x6200eaa4 stack 0x3a0b0a50 (0x3a0b0000-0x3a0b1000-0x3a1b0000)
0bb0:err:virtual:virtual_setup_exception stack overflow 672 bytes in thread 0bb0 addr 0x624bbf0b stack 0x3a2b0d60 (0x3a2b0000-0x3a2b2000-0x3a3b0000)


This problem exists in stable mesa aswell which why i was using mesa-devel for a long time but now the problem returned in this update.

The interesting thing is that if i keep trying then i can pass the game launch and i get loaded to the next scene where the problem occurs again.

So basically:

New Scene --> Game hangs or crash --> keep retrying the new scene like restarting 10 times ---> Pass the new scene.

After downgrading to 23.2.0.b.2111 everything works again as expected.

I do use wine 7.0.2_4,1 with an AMD RX 6700 running FreeBSD 14-ALPHA1.

The message above may be not useful for you but if there something what i can do  to gather more helpful output then let me know :)

Thank you!
